titleStmt.title: SII 34.272: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 272. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Kṛishṇarāya, Śaka 1442, Pramādi, Siṁha, sudi 10, Śiddhayōga, Friday, Ārdra = A.D, 1519, August 19, Friday (probably).

The nāṭṭavar of Valla-nāḍu had sold as tirunāmattukkāṇi of the temple of Tiruvaṅguḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār all the land in three villages in Kiḷippayiṟṟūr-nāḍu, namely Pālaikkuḍi, Kaḷaṅguḍi and Kiḷinallūr, for clearing the loan they had taken from the temple. Now they decided to pay themselves all the government taxes on those villages by distributing the responsibility over the entire nāḍu. The loan was taken earlier to pay some heavy taxes imposed on the nāḍu by Svāmi Narasā-nāyaka in the year Siddhārti (which is mentioned in No. 313 below).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Irācātirācaṉ IrācaparamEcuraṉ śrīvīrapratāpaṉ Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭaruḷi śrīkiṣṇarāyar tiruvirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 4 10 2ṉ mEṟ cellāniṉṟa pramāti caṅvaṟcarattu ciṅka nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum cittayOkamum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa tiruvātirai nāḷ Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭu vallanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷam Uṭaiya nāyiṉār ĀticaṇṭEśvara tEvaṟku valla nāṭu nāṭṭavarOm Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭuppuravu Āṉa
kiḷippayiṟṟūr nāṭṭil pālaikkuṭi kaḷaṅkuṭi kiḷinallūr Immūṉṟu Ūṟkum cuvāmi naracā nāyakkar kaṭamaikkup piṟavu vanta poṉṉukku Immūṉṟu Ūr veḷḷāḻaṟkum Inta Ūrkaḷ pāṭikāval Uṭaiyōm Āṉa Eṅkaḷukkum Inta Iṟai Āṟṟāmal Iṉṉayiṉār kōyiṟ paṇṭārattilē nāṅkaḷ kaṭaṉvāṅki Iṟutta poṉnukku Inta mūṉṟu Ūr mūṉṟu vayal perunāṉkellaikkuḷ Eppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uḷḷūr nayiṉār tēvatāṉam nīṅkal Āka
Iṉṉayiṉāṟku viṟṟu muṉṉāḷ cittātti varuṣattile Inta mūṉṟu Ūr mūṉṟu vayal perunāṉku Ellaikaḷilum Inta nattaṅkaḷilum caṟuvamāṉiya niṉṟayattilē Ippōtum Iṉṉayināṟku māvicai tiruppaṇikkum
tiruttērt tirunāṭcelavukkum Eṅkaḷ Uṭaiya taṉmam caṟuvamāṉṉiyam tirunāmattukkāṇi tāṉ vēṇṭiyak kuṭimuṭṭik kōyiṟ paṇṭārattār paṇṇai vaittukkoḷvar Ākavum Inta mūṉṟu Ūṟkum nāṭṭukkaṇakkiṉ Uḷvarippaṭi piṟivu vantapoṉ Uḷḷatu nāṅkaḷ nāṭṭilē mēṟpōṭṭuk koṇṭu Ūr tōṟum Ūr
vari Āka Araiyarkaḷē Iṟuppōmākavum Inta tēvatāṉattai nōkki varum vēṇṭukaḷ viṉiyōkam Eṟu cōṟu kūṭṭi Arici veṭṭi muṭṭāḷum nāṭṭilē mēṟpōṭṭukkoṇṭu Eṅkaḷ pāṭikāval cuvantara Eppēṟ paṭṭaṉavum Intat tēvatāṉattil peṟakkaṭavōm Allavākavum Innāṭṭu kaṇakku Āvuṭai
Digital edition of SII 34.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
